subject: refactor(ui): reduce custom-code footprint — shared HeadingInput, formFieldId, trim redundant memoization
body:
Seven findings from the custom-code reduction audit, applied after verifying
each against the surrounding call sites. No new custom Tailwind/CSS — only
extractions of pre-existing patterns and drops of overhead that wasn't
carrying its weight.

- ContractUploadPreview: pulse dot → `loading loading-spinner`.
- HeadingInput (new): deduped the inline-heading editable-input class chain
  between AgreementHeader and ProjectDetailPage. ~150 chars per call site
  removed; the class chain lives in one annotated place.
- NotificationBell: kept the inline item button's manual focus ring (can't
  adopt `btn btn-ghost` without breaking the multi-line `<li>` layout); the
  top-of-file comment now explains why.
- ProjectListPage: hoisted inline `useCallback(() => setToast(''), [])` out
  of JSX, matching ProjectDetailPage's pattern.
- ToneSelector: `useMemo(() => getRecentTones(), [])` → `useState(getRecentTones)`
  lazy-init. Drops a `useMemo` import; prevents per-keystroke I/O that pure
  inlining would have introduced. `customRecentTones` filter inlined (O(≤20)).
- useProjectRole: removed `useMemo` wrapper. Two `===` + object-literal are
  nanoseconds; every consumer destructures `{ isCreator }` immediately so
  object-reference churn doesn't propagate.
- formFieldId (new): extracted the duplicated label→slug helper used by
  Input + TextArea into `src/utils/formFieldId.ts`.

Audit buckets 3 (backcompat cleanup) and 4 (maps / translations / conversions)
produced no actionable findings — theme-key migration is still needed;
STATUS_BADGE and API wrappers are justified.

Verified: `tsc -b` clean, `npm run lint` clean, `npm test` → 22 passing
(3 dist-level tests auto-skipped as expected with no `dist/`).

Tags: refactor, cleanup, daisyui, code-quality
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: custom-code-reduction
Semver: patch
